title: 03264_Understanding_Plasticity_in_Neural_Networks
positive_examples: Improves the adaptability and robustness of deep reinforcement learning systems, which can lead to better performance in complex and constantly-changing environments.
Identifies architectural choices that can help preserve plasticity in neural networks, potentially leading to more effective AI applications.
negative_examples: Loss of plasticity in neural networks can lead to reduced performance on new tasks, which may hinder the development of reliable AI systems.
The findings suggest that existing methods to promote trainability may not be effective across all scenarios, potentially leading to inefficiencies in AI training processes.
